item.title: I Built My Mom an AI Recipe Helper for Mother's Day
item.snippet: A personal project using OpenAI, a small app interface, and cloud hosting to suggest recipes and shopping ideas.
item.content: This personal project uses AI prompts to suggest recipes and shopping ideas. The app runs in the cloud and includes a lightweight workflow for generating meal plans. It does not discuss agents, orchestration, tool use, delegation, or memory beyond a passing note about conversation history.
